top_articles.title: Europe sanctions Chinese and Iranian firms for cyberattacks
top_articles.summary: The European Union Council has announced sanctions against three entities and two individuals for their involvement in cyberattacks targeting critical infrastructure in the region.

top_articles.title: CISA flags Wing FTP Server flaw as actively exploited in attacks
top_articles.summary: CISA warned U.S. government agencies to secure their Wing FTP Server instances against an actively exploited vulnerability that may be chained in remote code execution attacks.
